error.message:
reconcile EspoCRM storage permissions under REPLACE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/prod/espo: docker [run --pull=never --rm --user 0:0 --entrypoint sh -v REPLACE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/prod/espo:/espo-storage -e ESPO_RUNTIME_UID -e ESPO_RUNTIME_GID alpine:3.20 -euc 
storage="/espo-storage"

chown -R "$ESPO_RUNTIME_UID:$ESPO_RUNTIME_GID" "$storage"
find "$storage" -type d -exec chmod 0755 {} +

for relative in data custom client/custom upload; do
  path="$storage/$relative"
  if [ -d "$path" ]; then
    find "$path" -type d -exec chmod 0775 {} +
    find "$path" -type f -exec chmod 0664 {} +
  fi
done
] failed: exit status 97: forced docker failure on match ':/espo-storage': run --pull=never --rm --user 0:0 --entrypoint sh -v REPLACE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/prod/espo:/espo-storage -e ESPO_RUNTIME_UID -e ESPO_RUNTIME_GID alpine:3.20 -euc 
storage="/espo-storage"

chown -R "$ESPO_RUNTIME_UID:$ESPO_RUNTIME_GID" "$storage"
find "$storage" -type d -exec chmod 0755 {} +

for relative in data custom client/custom upload; do
  path="$storage/$relative"
  if [ -d "$path" ]; then
    find "$path" -type d -exec chmod 0775 {} +
    find "$path" -type f -exec chmod 0664 {} +
  fi
done

items.details: Using manifest REPLACE_MANIFEST_JSON with database backup REPLACE_DB_BACKUP and files backup REPLACE_FILES_BACKUP.
items.summary: Restore source resolution completed from manifest

items.details: Using database container mock-db. Stopped application services before restore: espocrm, espocrm-daemon, espocrm-websocket.
The pre-restore emergency recovery point was skipped because of --no-snapshot.
Restored database espocrm in container mock-db from REPLACE_DB_BACKUP. The manifest REPLACE_MANIFEST_JSON anchored the selected backup set.

items.action: Resolve the permission reconciliation failure before rerunning restore.
